'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 136''' was the one hundred thirty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 4]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Matthew Harvey]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Republic 60|Prisoners of Ventress]]
*[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]]
*[[Smuggler/Legends|Smugglers]]
*[[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]
*[[Droid/Legends|Droid]] Maintenance
*[[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and Couture]]
*[[:Category:Medical technology|Surgical Technology]]
